plugins.name: git-skills
plugins.description: A powerful Git assistant skill with expert-level commit messages, branch management, and workflow guidance

features.title: Smart Branch Management
features.description: Auto-suggest branch naming conventions, quick create/switch/cleanup branches

features.title: Expert Commit Assistant
features.description: Generate detailed, professional commit messages following Conventional Commits

features.title: PR Workflow Assistant
features.description: PR creation checklist, auto-sync main branch, conflict resolution guidance

features.title: Code Review Assistant
features.description: Check change scope, sensitive data, commit message quality
